strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms (AWS CDK)
Proven expertise in AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflows at re:cinq
Strong open-source contributions and tooling development (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts, Trial)
concerns: Lack of explicit experience with Nest.js and Vitest — core required stack components
No clear evidence of Kotlin or Java usage in recent roles despite being a secondary requirement
German language proficiency is only basic, which may hinder collaboration in Berlin-based enterprise teams
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates exceptional full-stack depth, AI-agent exposure, and strong engineering craftsmanship with a track record of building scalable systems and open-source tools. His experience aligns closely with the core responsibilities and stack, though he lacks explicit use of Nest.js and Vitest, and his German proficiency is limited — but his technical rigor and adaptability suggest he can ramp up quickly.
